description_long: This is a dark green, single-propeller military airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-mounted straight wing configuration. The wings and fuselage display prominent red circular insignias, suggesting a historical or military context, possibly from World War II. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a clear canopy. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear is visible and appears to be of the taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall construction suggests a metal airframe with some glass components for the cockpit.
description: A dark green, single-propeller military airplane with red insignias, low-mounted straight wings, and a conventional tail. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned near the front, with visible taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, enclosed cockpit, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with red insignias.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, taildragger landing gear, and the red insignia on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the propeller, cockpit canopy, and the tail structure with visible insignias.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main wheels and a single tail wheel, fixed gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
